description:

Kinktober #1: Almost caught

In the middle of pleasuring yourself, your dragon roommate calls out, needing something from your room. Already knowing he'll more than likely come in without knocking, you quickly had to come up with a plan to hide your clear arousal

Requests are always welcome. Please read the rules on my profile before requesting on my latest bot.

The first kinktober bot. Not sure how many I'll make, but expect a lot of smut bots this month. There'll be more than likely some that I skip out, either due to not having the time or just simply not wanting to make a bot out of it.
